description_long: This is a small, faceted bottle with a geometric, red lower body resembling a cut gemstone. The bottle has a short, cylindrical neck topped with a round, beige cap, which appears to be made of wood or cork. Attached to the neck is a thin, golden handle or loop, which arches upward and then splits into two prongs at the back. The bottle's body is opaque and has a crystalline texture, giving it a decorative and precious appearance. The overall design suggests it could be used for holding potions, perfumes, or other valuable liquids. There are no visible labels, branding, or damage on the exterior.
description: A small, red, faceted bottle with a wooden cap and a golden handle, resembling a gemstone container.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red faceted body, wooden cap, and a single golden handle arching upward.
description_view_1: Back view reveals the golden handle splitting into two prongs, with the red body and cap still visible.
description_view_2: Side view displays the profile of the red faceted body and the golden handle curving to one side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the handle splitting into two prongs, with the red body and cap in profile.
